sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86712" key="proaristi/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προᾱριστίδιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n86712.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">before breakfast</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">luncheon,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλοῦς</foreign> (about <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0006.tlg007.perseus-grc1:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope> </bibl> miles) Scy. 1.64, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0006.tlg007.perseus-grc1:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">113</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
